capabilities_used.evidence: 他反复把 ETF 作为核心催化剂来讲，例如 [2025-10-31] “November 13 could be the most important date for $XRP holders in years... first U.S. spot $XRP ETF”，[2025-08-30] “Getting close to $SOL and $XRP ETFs”，[2025-04-30] “If this were to go through - #XRP flips #ETH next day!”。
他大量使用降息/收益率/流动性框架，[2026-01-30] “RATE CUTS COMING? ... massive for #Crypto”，[2025-07-29] “FED HOLD = BULLISH SIGNAL”，[2025-11-30] “FED SHOULD CUT RATES TO 1%. Risk appetite is coming”。
[2026-01-26] “The US Dollar Index just extended its monthly losses... lowest level since mid-September” 后直接连到 “my picks $GOLD $BTC $XRP $ETH”，说明他把美元走弱当作加密顺风。
[2024-11-24] “#btc dominance starting to shift to #altcoins mega pumps #sol #avax #ai projects” 明确使用 BTC.D 轮动框架判断山寨季。
[2026-01-30] 讨论新 Fed Chair 与降息预期，[2026-01-26] “90 days away from a new Fed Chair and the ‘Debt Trap’ is closing”，他明显把联储窗口当作市场 regime 切换事件。
[2025-07-29] 他用 “Consumer spending BEATING expectations”“Unemployment claims falling 6 straight weeks” 去论证风险偏好回归；这属于典型宏观景气/风险开关框架，虽然不是直接引用 PMI。

[2026-03-30] “The clash between @brian_armstrong and Jamie Dimon... stablecoin yield is ‘shadow banking’” 以及 [2026-03-30] “This is a recession explosion in the making if oil gets to $200 a barrel. And the Fed won't be able to assist the market” 体现其常从信用/银行体系压力去映射风险资产。
[2026-01-30] 他直接写到 “Technicals show a ‘Death Cross’ formation. A failure to reclaim $1.80 quickly...” 这是少数明确落在传统 TA 指标规则上的实例。
同一条 [2026-01-30] 中的 “failure to reclaim $1.80 quickly” 说明他会使用关键位/关键均线收复来判断趋势是否扭转，而不是单纯抄底。
他经常用趋势延续语言而非区间语言，如 [2025-11-29] “First step in a crypto market surge! Three more key catalysts could come in December!”，[2025-12-30] “Bullish”，更像在做趋势叙事而不是短线均值回归。
[2026-03-27] “Not looking good.”、[2025-10-29] “Survival time”、[2025-12-30] “Expect crypto weakness during U.S. trading hours...” 说明他也会做宏观风险关闭状态识别。
[2025-12-29] “Crypto is stuck in Extreme Fear... while $GOLD rides near record highs... sentiment gap is often where capital later rotates back” 以及 [2026-01-26] 同时提到 $GOLD 与加密，明显在观察避险资产与加密的轮动。
[2026-03-31] “The S&P 500 surges +2.5%... $BTC $ETH 🚀” 直接把 SPX 风险偏好映射到加密；[2025-07-29] 也用宏观数据解释市场强弱。
虽然他很少精确讲减半月份，但多次使用 “Bullrun2025”“2026 will be our year”“10T crypto market cap in 2026” 这类跨周期叙事，符合周期分段思维。
他的长期框架高度依赖牛熊轮动年份表达，如 [2025-03-18] “next leg on the #Bullrun2025 - Yes, still intact!”、[2025-12-31] “US assets will fly in 2026.”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Regulatory Clarity Catalyst
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trades directional crypto exposure based on legislative, SEC, White House, OCC, or court developments that improve or damage regulatory clarity for a token, sector, or market structure.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 基于立法、SEC、白宫、OCC 或法院进展带来的监管清晰度变化，去交易单个代币、板块或整体市场方向。

output_when_triggered.bias: bullish if clarity improves, bearish if blocked

new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-01-29] “CLARITY UPDATE...”; [2026-03-28] “Protect DEFI, developers, and self custody... crypto wins!”；[2026-04-09] “Crypto Now National Security! ... well-defined regulatory perimeter would strengthen...”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: American Crypto Narrative Rotation
new_capabilities_proposed.name_zh: 美国本土加密叙事轮动
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Overweights tokens framed as strategic U.S. winners under policy, national-security, or institutional adoption narratives.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 当某些代币被包装为美国政策、国家安全或机构采用受益者时，给予其结构性超配。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-07-31] “White House crypto report shows @hedera $HBAR as an American Crypto asset”; [2025-02-20] “what crypto will be the rails for crypto payments in #America?”

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Stablecoin Policy Arb
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Trades stablecoin issuers, payment rails, and related L1/Ledger tokens based on policy toward yield, reserves, and banking access.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 围绕稳定币利息、储备金与银行准入政策变化，交易稳定币发行方、支付网络及相关公链/账本代币。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2026-02-27] “Why is the administration so determined to kill retail yield?”；[2025-11-27] “And so it begins! #RLUSD”；[2025-05-26] 关于 Ripple/Circle/USDC 并购与稳定币版图。

new_capabilities_proposed.name: Community Sentiment Poll Momentum
new_capabilities_proposed.description: Uses retail/community polling, engagement spikes, and creator audience reactions as a soft momentum or narrative-strength signal.
new_capabilities_proposed.description_zh: 把社区投票、互动飙升与内容受众反馈，当作软性的动量/叙事强度信号。
new_capabilities_proposed.example_evidence: [2025-03-14] “Early lead: the #XRPforce is strong in this one. Market Sentiment never lies.”；[2025-03-18] “round Robin based on popular voting to determine a Portfolio”

personal_quirks.quote: Long term is the only trade
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 默认以长期持有和大级别主题配置为核心，而非高频进出。
面对自己核心持仓时，倾向继续上修预期，属于强信念加仓型叙事。

personal_quirks.quote: There’s a difference between taking risks and throwing darts blindfolded. Smart leverage on real businesses beats memecoin roulette every time.
personal_quirks.rule_paraphrased: 愿意承担风险，但反对纯随机博弈；偏好有基本叙事或制度背书的资产。
把社区情绪和受众反馈视为可操作的市场信息源。

unique_traits: 他不像传统纯图表交易员，更像“政策催化 + 宏观流动性 + 社区叙事”三合一的加密内容型交易者。核心优势不是复杂 K 线结构，而是把 ETF、监管、稳定币、Fed、美元与‘American crypto’主题快速打包成方向性观点。附图也基本不是技术图，而是品牌/事件/主题视觉，进一步说明他的框架偏 narrative-driven 而非纯 TA。

low_conviction_phrases: Not sure how to take this just yet.
I’m trying not to fall for the fear porn
